name: Biscuits Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Add the milk all at once and stir quickly with a fork until the dough just comes together and follows the fork around the bowl.
4. Knead on a lightly floured surface 10-12 times.
5. Roll or pat into rounds that are 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut out biscuits.
7. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 10-12 minutes in an oven preheated to 450°F.
